title: ligustrum delavayanum subsp. morrisonense
intro: Ligustrum delavayanum subsp. morrisonense, also known as Ligustrum morrisonense, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, commonly found in Taiwan and other parts of East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ligustrum morrisonense include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and possess antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, Ligustrum morrisonense is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
